_provenance: Claude-authored original Digital SAT Standard English Conventions items, batch 3. 100% original, not copied from College Board. DeepSeek not used.

sets.passage: Scientists ______ study the deep ocean often depend on remotely operated robots, because the crushing pressure found at such depths would flatten any human diver almost instantly.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: 限定性关系从句修饰 Scientists，用 who 且不加逗号；加逗号变非限定改变语义，which 指物，whom 为宾格。

sets.passage: The museum has announced that, once the long-delayed renovation is finally complete, visitors ______ able to walk directly beneath the suspended whale skeleton for the first time in the building's history.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: once 引导的将来条件下，主句表将来动作，用 will be。

sets.passage: The small startup prided ______ on never once sending a marketing email, trusting instead that genuinely satisfied customers would quietly recommend the app to their friends and coworkers.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: 主语 The small startup 为单数，反身代词用 itself；themselves 为复数。

sets.passage: During the intense field season the interns were expected to collect water samples before dawn, label every bottle by midmorning, and ______ the day's results into the shared database each evening without fail.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: were expected to collect, label, and enter 共享 to，三个动词原形平行，用 enter。

sets.passage: The conference drew researchers from three strikingly different cities ______ Nairobi, Kenya; Lima, Peru; and Hanoi, Vietnam, each delegation bringing field data that existed nowhere else in the world.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: 前为独立句，后接以分号分隔的城市列表，用冒号引出整个列表；其余标点不当。

sets.passage: If either the two senior editors or the managing director ______ to approve the heavily revised manuscript by Friday, the publisher has promised to move the release date forward by a full month.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: either…or… 谓语遵循就近原则，与最近的单数主语 the managing director 一致，用 agrees。

sets.passage: Designed to survive temperatures that would instantly shatter ordinary glass, ______ has already sent back images from stretches of the desert that no camera had ever managed to reach before.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: 开头分词短语 Designed to survive… 须修饰其后主语，只有 the new lens 是被设计的对象，其余造成悬垂修饰。

sets.passage: The detective realized, far too late to matter, that the nervous witness ______ the crucial detail not out of simple forgetfulness but because someone had quietly warned her to stay silent.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: 动作发生在 realized 这一过去时点之前，用过去完成时 had omitted。

sets.passage: She is one of the few biologists who ______ consistently argued that the fungal networks threading beneath a forest floor deserve every bit as much protection as the towering trees rising above them.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: one of the few biologists who… 中 who 指代复数先行词 biologists，用复数 have argued。

sets.passage: After weeks of study the committee concluded that fully restoring the crumbling old theater would be both more expensive and ______ than simply building an entirely new hall on the vacant lot by the river.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: both more expensive and more complicated 须比较级平行；complicatedly 为副词，complication 为名词，most complicated 为最高级。

sets.passage: The prototype passed every laboratory test the engineers could possibly devise ______ however, it failed within minutes the very first time anyone tried to use it outdoors in a steady rain.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: however 为连接副词，连接两个独立句时前用分号、后用逗号：; however,；逗号造成 comma splice，缺逗号亦不规范。

sets.passage: The scientist ______ first proposed the idea was at first widely ignored, yet within a single generation her once-radical hypothesis had become the standard explanation taught in nearly every classroom.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: 关系代词作从句主语（who first proposed），用主格 who；whom 为宾格，which 指物，whose 为所有格。

sets.passage: A number of long-abandoned coal mines scattered across the region ______ slowly filling with clear groundwater, creating eerie underground lakes that a handful of daring divers have only recently begun to explore.
sets.prompt: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
sets.explain_zh: a number of + 复数名词作主语视为复数，用 are（对比 the number of… 用单数）。
